title: frontend: MetadataDisplay: Fix owner ref link when apiVersion mismatch
author: ManthanNimodiya

findings.description: resourceClass.apiVersion === ownerRef.apiVersion uses strict equality. A comment noting that this relies on consistent apiVersion format parity between the resource class registry and the Kubernetes API response would help future maintainers.
Minimal, well-targeted fix. Refactoring the repeated ResourceClasses lookup into a const variable reduces redundancy. Plain-text fallback for mismatched apiVersion is the correct safe behavior.
